name: Crescita Esponenziale
seo_description: Calcola la portata e la velocita dell'acqua nei tubi in base al diametro e alla pressione. Calcolatrice idraulica per dimensionamento e analisi del flusso.
example_label: Calculate exponential growth starting at 150 with 3.5% rate over 8 years.
result_context: The finale value {final} after exponential growth over the time period.
steps: Initial P₀ = 150, rate r = 3.5% = 0.035, time t = 8 years
mistakes: Using percentage directly instead of decimal (3.5 vs 0.035)
Using (1+r)^t instead of e^(rt) for continuous growth
Confusing exponential growth with linear growth
